## Description

3. ...

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the tool's error text if any.

- Node.js version (`node -v`):

Paste relevant logs or the tool's structured error output.

> ⚠️ **Do not paste API keys, tokens, or real user identities/PII.** Redact secrets and personal data first.
